title: revived pet
description: When your pet (wolf or cat) dies, it drops its collar. You can revive it as a zombie form by sneaking with the collar in hand near a charged Respawn Anchor.
body:
![Logo](https://i.postimg.cc/Pf6wZf4p/reved-pets.png)
[![discord-plural](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@intergrav/devins-badges@3/assets/cozy/social/discord-plural_64h.png)]([https://discord.gg/wJxqmfRqaN](https://discord.gg/NeQWTETTbj)) 
[![kofi-idk](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@intergrav/devins-badges@3/assets/cozy/donate/kofi-singular_64h.png)](https://ko-fi.com/kiwikcz)
# 📖 Description
This datapack introduces a unique pet resurrection system. When your wolf or cat dies, it drops its collar with its original name. Holding that collar and sneaking near a charged Respawn Anchor will revive your pet as a zombie. In this form, it becomes stronger in combat but burns in sunlight. You can cure it by throwing a weakness potion and feeding it, returning it to normal. If it dies again as a zombie, it will drop its collar once more, but reviving it will bring it back as a skeleton. Skeleton pets cannot become zombies or normal again and also burn under the sun. If they die as skeletons, they’re gone forever. The collar always keeps your pet’s original name, regardless of any anvil renaming attempts.

![Image](https://i.postimg.cc/Znh4vdQt/wolf.gif)
